---
title: Singing with Quarto
description: "Quarto: love at first sight!"
author: "Yanto Chandra"
date: "21 March 2026"
image: "cover.jpg"
categories:
  - Science
  - Technology
---

I’ve been diving into Quarto lately, and honestly, the thing that blows me away is how *ridiculously versatile* 😄😄 it is. Basically, it’s a tool for publishing stuff—like reports, blogs, even entire books—but the magic is that once written it can magically turn into a PDF, a website, a Word doc, or even a cool beamer-style presentation. The other really cool part is: you can ✅toss in some codes from Python or R in a document, and Quarto handles all the messy behind-the-scenes work. So whether I need to send a quick ✅memo, whip up a blog ✅or churn a manuscript and use the exact same workflow 🔄, which feels like cheating 🔓🔓 but in the best way possible.
